sarah_security.name: Sarah Secure
sarah_security.title: Security Specialist
sarah_security.dialogBefore:
Security is no joke.
Let's see if your gems can
handle a real audit.
sarah_security.dialogAfter:
Impressive. Your authentication
is solid. Take the SSL Badge.

bench_mark.name: Bench Mark
bench_mark.title: Performance Engineer
bench_mark.dialogBefore:
Every millisecond counts.
Can your gems keep up
with my optimizations?
bench_mark.dialogAfter:
Fast and efficient.
You've earned the Benchmark Badge.

tess_driven.name: Tess Driven
tess_driven.title: QA Lead
tess_driven.dialogBefore:
All tests must pass.
No exceptions. No flaky specs.
Let's see your test suite.
tess_driven.dialogAfter:
All green. No failures.
The Green Badge is yours.

dba_dan.name: DBA Dan
dba_dan.title: Database Architect
dba_dan.dialogBefore:
I've managed petabytes of data.
Your little gems don't
scare my schemas.
dba_dan.dialogAfter:
Your queries are optimized.
Take the Migration Badge.
You've mastered Rails Dev: Red Edition!
